prompt: In @prune/intelligence, the speculative action cache misclassifies some write-capable commands as safe to serve from cache, and its freshness logic can serve stale entries. Fix the write-capability misclassification and make the freshness check sound. The package's test suite currently has failing safety tests specifying the expected behavior.
notes: Reference: tcrp harden F3 (write-capable command misclassification + freshness soundness) 2026-06-01.
